configs.description: Whether to download model from ModelScope. When set to True, models will be fetched from ModelScope instead of HuggingFace.
Timeout in seconds for the engine to become ready. If the engine does not become ready within this time, the process will exit.
Timeout in seconds for Mooncake to automatically release prefilled KV cache entries.
Enable vLLM V1 engine. In v0.18.0, V1 is the default engine and this env var has been removed from envs.py. Kept for backward compatibility reference.
configs.notes: CODE-MISSING: This env var is not defined in vllm/envs.py for v0.18.0. V1 is now the default engine.

configs.description: Enable PyTorch profiler with stack trace collection. Set to 1 to enable. Helps with performance analysis but adds overhead.
configs.notes: CODE-MISSING: This env var is referenced in vllm/config/profiler.py comment but not defined in vllm/envs.py. It may be handled internally by PyTorch profiler.

configs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for distributed RPC communication. Used in multi-node deployments.
Timeout in seconds for model inference execution. If a single forward pass takes longer than this, the process will be terminated.
Host IP address for the API server to listen on. Common values: 0.0.0.0 (all interfaces) or a specific IP.
Port number for the API server. Common values: 8000, 8005, 30050, 30060.
Run in headless mode without interactive terminal. Useful for background/detached deployment.
Global data parallelism degree. Total number of data parallel replicas across all nodes. Common values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16.
Number of data parallel replicas to run on this node. Used in multi-node deployments where each node runs a subset of total DP replicas.
Starting data parallel rank for secondary nodes. Used to assign rank offsets in multi-node DP deployments.
Data parallel rank of this instance. When set, enables external load balancer mode.
IP address of the data parallel cluster head node. Used for inter-node DP communication.
Port for data parallel RPC communication between nodes. Common value: 13389.
Number of API server processes. When data-parallel-size > 1, defaults to data-parallel-size. Set to 0 to disable built-in API server (for external LB mode).
Tensor parallelism degree. Number of NPU devices used for tensor-parallel inference. Common values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16.

Enable expert parallelism for MoE models. When enabled, MoE experts are distributed across devices using EP instead of TP. Note: vLLM does not support mixed ETP and EP; MoE can use either pure EP or pure TP.
Backend for distributed execution. Options: 'mp' (multiprocessing), 'ray'. On Ascend NPU, 'mp' is commonly used.
Global random seed for reproducibility. Common value: 1024.
The model name used in the API. If not specified, the model name will be the same as --model argument.
Maximum number of sequences per iteration. Limits the concurrency of inference. For performance testing, max-num-seqs * data-parallel-size should be >= actual total concurrency.
Model maximum context length (sum of input + output tokens per request). Lower values reduce memory usage. Common values: 16384, 32768, 65536, 131072.
Maximum number of tokens the model can process in a single step. Controls chunked prefill behavior. Larger values reduce latency but increase memory pressure.
Allow loading of remote custom model code from HuggingFace/ModelScope. Required for some models with custom implementations.
Proportion of NPU HBM memory that vLLM will use for inference. Higher values allocate more KV cache but risk OOM. Default: 0.9. Common values on Ascend: 0.85-0.96.
Enable prefix caching for KV cache. Reuses KV cache for common prompt prefixes across requests.
Explicitly disable prefix caching. Use this flag to ensure prefix caching is off when it might be enabled by default.
Enable the hybrid KV cache manager. This manager optimizes KV cache allocation between different request types.
Force eager execution mode, disabling graph compilation (ACL Graph on Ascend). Useful for debugging but reduces performance.
Enable asynchronous scheduling. Allows non-blocking task scheduling to improve concurrency and throughput, especially for large-scale models.
Path to a custom Jinja2 chat template file. Overrides the default template from the model's tokenizer.
Speculative decoding configuration JSON. Supports methods like 'mtp' (multi-token prediction) and 'eagle3'. Example: {"num_speculative_tokens": 3, "method": "mtp"}

Graph compilation configuration JSON. Key fields: 'cudagraph_mode' (PIECEWISE or FULL_DECODE_ONLY, recommended: FULL_DECODE_ONLY) and 'cudagraph_capture_sizes' (list of batch sizes for graph capture).

Mooncake distributed KV transfer configuration JSON. Used for PD disaggregation. Specifies connector type (MooncakeLayerwiseConnector/MooncakeConnectorV1) and kv_role (kv_producer/kv_consumer/kv_both).

doc_code_consistency.detail: This env var is listed in extraction_targets but not defined in vllm/envs.py for v0.18.0. V1 is now the default engine and the env var has been removed.
This env var is listed in extraction_targets but not defined in vllm/envs.py. It is only referenced in a comment in vllm/config/profiler.py. It may be handled internally by PyTorch profiler.
